title: Product Roadmap H2 2025
description: Interactive roadmap prototype for the second half of 2025 covering AI interviews rollout, ATS enhancements, and the candidate trust initiative. Used for board-level alignment.

title: Pricing & Packaging v2
description: Revised pricing tier exploration — Starter, Growth, and Enterprise — with usage-based AI interview credits. Includes competitive benchmarking against Ashby and Greenhouse.
